hero.name: Sebastián Huertas
hero.description: Computer Science Engineer passionate about building scalable software systems and intelligent solutions. I enjoy solving complex problems through clean, efficient, and well-structured code, continuously learning and applying modern technologies to develop high-impact, production-ready applications.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: I am a final-year Computer Science Engineering student at Universidad del Valle de Guatemala with hands-on experience in software development and a strong focus on scalable web applications and artificial intelligence. I have worked with technologies such as React, TypeScript, Next.js, Ruby on Rails, and both relational and non-relational databases, contributing to full-stack solutions and AI-driven systems that create real-world impact.

items.role: Full Stack Developer specialized in AI
items.description: Develop scalable web applications using Next.js and TypeScript, translating Figma designs into production-ready interfaces. Implement RAG pipelines integrating Qdrant and Gemini to enhance AI agents' contextual understanding. Design and orchestrate AI agents using OpenRouter, GPT, and Grok, optimize workflows with n8n, and manage structured content through Strapi CMS.

Develop full-stack solutions using React, TypeScript, and Ruby on Rails. Manage MongoDB and MySQL databases ensuring performance and data consistency. Integrate secure payment gateways with Recurrente and identity verification systems with Didit. Contributed to the development of a job-matching platform and inventory management modules with barcode scanning.

Developed and maintained a medical anamnesis system using Laravel and PHP for frontend, backend, and REST APIs. Resolved frontend issues and optimized system workflows. Gained hands-on experience in basic Linux server administration and application deployment.

Developed secure backend systems using Laravel and relational databases. Implemented role-based access control (RBAC) for medical forms to ensure compliance and data security. Maintained static pages and resolved production issues, improving platform stability and user experience.

Final-year student with a GPA above 90%. Focused on Software Engineering, Algorithms, Databases, Web Technologies, and Artificial Intelligence. Developed academic and practical projects using React, Node.js, TypeScript, and modern software architectures.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of projects I've built across web development, APIs, and design.

items.title: AgentsGT
items.description: Web platform for creating, managing, and renting customized AI agents. Contributed to UI improvements and advanced AI feature integrations to enhance user experience and agent capabilities.
features: Redesigned and improved dashboard UI for better usability and workflow clarity
Integrated Gemini-powered image generation and interpretation tools directly into the CopilotKit runtime
Built a full document editor allowing users to create documents from scratch, edit in real time, or generate new documents based on existing ones
Implemented context expansion using Gemini RAG for enhanced agent responses
Enabled file uploads and dynamic context injection into the agent runtime using Gemini RAG

items.title: ConvoFlow
items.description: Web platform for designing and orchestrating customizable workflows that connect with external services and APIs. Contributed to UI development, node debugging features, and runtime execution improvements.
features: Developed and improved the user interface for creating and managing visual workflow nodes
Implemented node debugging tools to trace execution flow and validate data between steps
Enabled runtime execution accessible from any node with preloaded contextual data
Designed modular workflow structures allowing seamless integration with external services
Improved usability and interaction for complex multi-step automation processes

items.title: Therapist Track
items.description: Custom-built web application for document management and administration. Contributed to backend development, database architecture design, and secure document storage integration.
features: Designed and structured MongoDB collections with references to ensure scalability and data integrity
Developed secure RESTful HTTP endpoints for full document lifecycle management
Implemented endpoint protection strategies based on role validation and security analysis
Integrated AWS S3 for secure upload, download, and persistent document storage
Applied SCRUM methodology to identify security requirements and iterate on backend improvements

items.title: Jacks Cave Backend
items.description: University project backend for a career-focused vlog platform. Contributed to content modeling, API structure, and backend-service integration.
features: Designed and implemented content types and model structures in Strapi based on development tickets
Built and configured RESTful endpoints for content management
Connected Strapi backend with Supabase services for data handling and extended functionality
Improved understanding of CMS and CRM-style content architectures
Collaborated in an agile environment to iteratively define and refine backend requirements

items.title: Othello AI
items.description: University project focused on developing an intelligent Othello-playing agent using classical AI algorithms and machine learning techniques to improve long-term decision making.
features: Implemented the Minimax algorithm for strategic decision-making
Optimized search performance using Alpha-Beta Pruning to reduce computational complexity
Designed evaluation functions to improve long-term board state assessment
Integrated machine learning techniques to allow the model to improve as it played more games
Developed a Flask-based interface to simulate and test gameplay interactions

items.title: Blog Anime
items.description: Full-stack blog built with React, Node.js, Vite, and JavaScript, featuring a robust API for seamless database connectivity.
features: User authentication and session management
Anime post creation with rich text editor
RESTful API backend with Node.js and Express
MariaDB integration for persistent data storage

items.title: SmartYou
items.description: Figma prototype for a mobile app allowing SmartFit users to schedule gym sessions and avoid overcrowding, with a points reward system.
features: Gym session scheduling and slot reservation
Real-time occupancy visualization
Points reward system for frequent users
Mobile-first UX with accessibility focus

items.title: UVG Shop
items.description: First mobile application developed as a university project. Marketplace platform designed for the university community, applying Design Thinking principles and native Android development.
features: Implemented Google login authentication for secure user access
Developed product creation and listing functionality
Enabled direct photo capture from the device camera
Integrated image upload for product publishing
Designed user flows and interface prototypes using Design Thinking methodology

items.title: Gubernamental App
items.description: Cross-platform mobile application developed with Flutter (iOS and Android) for document upload, processing, and automated data extraction to generate user dashboards and analytical reports.
features: Implemented secure document upload and management system
Integrated AI agents from AgentsGT for automated document processing and information extraction
Generated dynamic dashboards and analytical reports based on extracted data
Designed cross-platform UI ensuring consistency across iOS and Android
Optimized data flow between mobile frontend and AI-powered backend services
